case_title: MARY D LAU VS. LOVEJOY'S TEA ROOM, SF ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-30-2018 CONTINUED TO JUL-11-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-21-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
